summary: Frontend UI readability testing completed for Shemford School Management System. All reported UI issues have been successfully fixed. Tested sidebar visibility, dashboard stat cards, orange attendance card, page headings, tables, warning banners, and navigation.

features_tested.details: All 12 sidebar menu items now visible with light gray text (text-gray-300) on dark background (#1A1A1A)
Active item has orange background (#E88A1A) with white text - tested Dashboard, Students, Employees, Fees, etc.
All stat cards display icons correctly - amber for Total Students/Employees, green for Fee Collection, red for Fee Overdue
Orange card (#E88A1A) displays properly with white text, no longer blank

features_tested.feature: Open Issues and Academic Year cards
features_tested.details: Cards display readable dark text on white background
All 6 quick action cards show colored icons (amber) and readable text
All page headings (Students, Employees, Fees, Attendance, Marks, Reports, Announcements) are readable with proper contrast
Table displays with proper text contrast - admission numbers, names, class info, parent info visible
Employee table displays with proper text contrast, warning banner (amber background, amber text) is readable
Red warning banner with red text on red-50 background is clearly readable
All sidebar navigation works without UI breaks - tested all 12 pages

critical_code_review_comments: The colorMap fix in Dashboard.js properly replaces dynamic Tailwind classes with static class names
Today's Attendance card correctly uses plain div instead of Card component to avoid bg-card override
sidebar-item CSS class in index.css includes text-gray-300 for proper visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI readability issues have been fixed and verified. The main fixes were: 1) sidebar-item class now includes text-gray-300, 2) Dashboard stat cards use colorMap object with static Tailwind classes instead of dynamic template literals, 3) Today's Attendance card uses plain div instead of Card component. All pages tested: Dashboard, Students, Employees, Users, Attendance, Fees, Marks, Announcements, Syllabus, Issues, Messages, Reports.

mocked_apis_list: SendGrid email (using Resend with test key)
